query: hey so I have this excalidraw file at docs/arch.excalidraw that shows our old microservices layout, can you update it to show the new gateway service we added?
can you read through apps/desktop/architecture.excalidraw.json and tell me what components are in there? I need a summary for the design doc
I've got two excalidraw diagrams — one in docs/v1-arch.excalidraw and one in docs/v2-arch.excalidraw. Can you compare them and tell me what changed between the versions?
there's an excalidraw file somewhere in the repo that has our data flow diagram, can you find it and explain what it shows?
the diagram at Docs/Plans/system-overview.excalidraw.json is outdated — we renamed the AuthService to IdentityService, can you fix that in the file?
I need you to look at the .excalidraw file in our docs folder and add a new database node connected to the API service
what's in the excalidraw diagram at infra/network-topology.excalidraw? just give me the high-level components, don't need all the details
can you open up docs/deployment-flow.excalidraw.json and remove the staging environment box? we simplified the pipeline
someone drew an architecture diagram in excalidraw last sprint, it should be in the Docs folder — can you check what services are shown and whether Redis is included?
the labels in our excalidraw diagram are wrong — the file is at designs/current-state.excalidraw, can you rename 'OrderService' to 'CommerceService' and 'PaymentGateway' to 'BillingEngine'?
I need a new architecture diagram showing our microservices — API gateway, three backend services, and a shared database
can you create a flowchart for our CI/CD pipeline? it goes from PR to review to build to staging to prod
make me a mind map about the different approaches to caching we discussed
draw a system diagram showing how our frontend talks to the backend through the API gateway
I need an AWS architecture diagram with EC2, S3, Lambda, and RDS showing our cloud setup
create a sequence diagram showing the OAuth2 login flow between the browser, our server, and Google
can you visualize the database schema as an ER diagram? we have users, posts, comments, and likes tables
search my vault for notes about system architecture
can you look at the PNG diagram in docs/overview.png and describe what it shows?
generate a mermaid diagram showing our git branching strategy
